_readme: TFT UI layout in NORMALIZED screen coords (0..1 of the rectified
1920x1080 screen). Defaults below are eyeballed for TFT at 1920x1080
borderless with default HUD scale -- VERIFY before real games:
draws every point on a screenshot so you can nudge these numbers.
The agent re-observes after every action, so being ~10px off is fine;
being a whole slot off is not.

shop_slots._comment: centers of the 5 shop cards, left to right

bench._comment: centers of the 9 bench slots, left to right

_comment: player half: 4 rows x 7 hexes. row 0 = BACK (nearest center line),
row 3 = FRONT (nearest bench). Odd rows shift right a half step
(hex grid). Perspective squeezes the back rows slightly; the
flat col_step is close enough for vision-corrected clicking.

augments._comment: centers of the 3 augment choice cards

regions._comment: OCR regions as (nx, ny, nw, nh)

hotkeys._comment: TFT native hotkeys -- pressed on the PHYSICAL keyboard
